Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

wb = openpyxl.Workbook\(\)
ws = wb.active
ws.title = "功能清单"

# ── 样式定义 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
header_font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=10\)
header_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="2E4057"\)

domain_font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", bold=True, color="FFFFFF", size=10\)
domain_fills = {
    "用户认证与权限": PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="1B6CA8"\),
    "调研准备模块":   PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="2E7D32"\),
    "调研执行模块":   PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="6A1B9A"\),
    "调研整理模块":   PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="E65100"\),
    "专家工作台":     PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="00695C"\),
    "案例库管理":     PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4527A0"\),
    "管理后台":       PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="558B2F"\),
    "移动端特有功能": PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="AD1457"\),
    "系统基础能力":   PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="4E342E"\),
}

p0_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="FFCDD2"\)
p1_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="FFF9C4"\)
p2_fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="E8F5E9"\)

center = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
left   = Alignment\(horizontal="left",   vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)

thin = Side\(style="thin", color="BDBDBD"\)
border = Border\(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin\)

# ── 列头 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
headers = ["序号","功能域","模块/子系统","功能点","功能描述",
           "使用角色","端","优先级","相关技术/服务","备注"]
col_widths = [6, 18, 20, 22, 52, 20, 12, 8, 24, 20]

for ci, \(h, w\) in enumerate\(zip\(headers, col_widths\), 1\):
    cell = ws.cell\(row=1, column=ci, value=h\)
    cell.font   = header_font
    cell.fill   = header_fill
    cell.alignment = center
    cell.border = border
    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter\(ci\)].width = w

ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 30
ws.freeze_panes = "A2"

# ── 数据 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 格式: \(功能域, 模块, 功能点, 功能描述, 角色, 端, 优先级, 技术/服务, 备注\)
ADMIN  = "管理员\(ADMIN\)"
SALES  = "销售\(SALES\)"
EXPERT = "专家\(EXPERT\)"
ALL3   = "全部角色"
AE     = "ADMIN/EXPERT"
SE     = "SALES/EXPERT"
WEB    = "Web"
APP    = "Android"
BOTH   = "Web + Android"

rows = [
# ━━━ 1. 用户认证与权限 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
\("用户认证与权限","认证系统","账号登录",
 "邮箱/手机号 + 密码登录，JWT Access Token + Refresh Token 双 Token 机制，Token 过期自动刷新",
 ALL3, BOTH, "P0","JWT, bcrypt",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","认证系统","三端独立入口",
 "销售端、专家端、管理端为三个独立登录入口，URL/子域名区分，登录后跳转对应工作台",
 ALL3, WEB, "P0","NestJS Guard",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","认证系统","移动端 Token 持久化",
 "Android 端使用 Secure Storage 持久化 Token，App 重启自动恢复登录状态",
 SALES, APP, "P0","React Native SecureStore",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","认证系统","登出与 Token 吊销",
 "主动登出时服务端加入黑名单，支持强制下线（管理员操作）",
 ALL3, BOTH, "P1","Redis Token 黑名单",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","多租户权限","租户数据隔离",
 "所有业务数据携带 tenant_id，PostgreSQL RLS 策略保证跨租户数据不可见",
 ALL3, BOTH, "P0","PostgreSQL RLS",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","多租户权限","超级租户穿透",
 "中科琉光（超级租户）ADMIN/EXPERT 可跨租户查看所有数据，is_super_tenant 标志控制",
 AE, WEB, "P0","RLS SECURITY DEFINER",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","多租户权限","角色权限控制",
 "ADMIN 管理租户和案例库；SALES 只能操作本租户访谈数据；EXPERT 可查看全部访谈报告",
 ALL3, BOTH, "P0","NestJS RBAC Guard",""\),
\("用户认证与权限","用户管理","用户邀请注册",
 "管理员生成邀请链接，受邀者通过链接注册并自动归属对应租户和角色",
 ADMIN, WEB, "P1","邮件/短信",""\),

 ADMIN, WEB, "P2","PostgreSQL audit_logs",""\),

# ━━━ 8. 移动端特有功能 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 ALL3, BOTH, "P0","腾讯 COS",""\),

# ── 写入数据 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
seq = 1
current_domain = None

for r in rows:
    domain, module, feature, desc, role, platform, priority, tech, note = r

    if domain != current_domain:
        current_domain = domain

    row_idx = seq + 1
    values = [seq, domain, module, feature, desc, role, platform, priority, tech, note]

    fill = domain_fills.get\(domain, PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="F5F5F5"\)\)
    pri_fill = {"P0": p0_fill, "P1": p1_fill, "P2": p2_fill}.get\(priority\)

    for ci, val in enumerate\(values, 1\):
        cell = ws.cell\(row=row_idx, column=ci, value=val\)
        cell.border = border
        cell.alignment = center if ci in [1,6,7,8] else left
        cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9\)

        # 功能域列染色
        if ci == 2:
            cell.fill = fill
            cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9, bold=True, color="FFFFFF"\)
        # 优先级列染色
        if ci == 8 and pri_fill:
            cell.fill = pri_fill
            cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9, bold=True\)

    ws.row_dimensions[row_idx].height = 40
    seq += 1

# ── 合并功能域单元格 ──────────────────────────────────────
# 按功能域分组合并
domain_ranges = {}
for row_idx in range\(2, ws.max_row + 1\):
    d = ws.cell\(row=row_idx, column=2\).value
    if d:
        if d not in domain_ranges:
            domain_ranges[d] = [row_idx, row_idx]
        else:
            domain_ranges[d][1] = row_idx

for domain, \(start, end\) in domain_ranges.items\(\):
    if start < end:
        ws.merge_cells\(start_row=start, start_column=2, end_row=end, end_column=2\)
        cell = ws.cell\(row=start, column=2\)
        cell.alignment = Alignment\(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True\)
        fill = domain_fills.get\(domain, PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="F5F5F5"\)\)
        cell.fill = fill
        cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9, bold=True, color="FFFFFF"\)
        cell.border = border

# ── 第二个 Sheet：优先级汇总 ──────────────────────────────
ws2 = wb.create_sheet\("优先级统计"\)
ws2.column_dimensions["A"].width = 20
ws2.column_dimensions["B"].width = 10
ws2.column_dimensions["C"].width = 10
ws2.column_dimensions["D"].width = 10
ws2.column_dimensions["E"].width = 12

headers2 = ["功能域", "P0", "P1", "P2", "合计"]
for ci, h in enumerate\(headers2, 1\):
    cell = ws2.cell\(row=1, column=ci, value=h\)
    cell.font = header_font
    cell.fill = header_fill
    cell.alignment = center
    cell.border = border

domain_order = list\(domain_fills.keys\(\)\)
total_p = [0,0,0]
for ri, domain in enumerate\(domain_order, 2\):
    domain_rows = [r for r in rows if r[0] == domain]
    p0 = sum\(1 for r in domain_rows if r[6]=="P0"\)
    p1 = sum\(1 for r in domain_rows if r[6]=="P1"\)
    p2 = sum\(1 for r in domain_rows if r[6]=="P2"\)
    total = p0+p1+p2
    total_p[0]+=p0; total_p[1]+=p1; total_p[2]+=p2

    fill = domain_fills.get\(domain, PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="F5F5F5"\)\)
    for ci, val in enumerate\([domain, p0, p1, p2, total], 1\):
        cell = ws2.cell\(row=ri, column=ci, value=val\)
        cell.border = border
        cell.alignment = center
        cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9\)
        if ci == 1:
            cell.fill = fill
            cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", size=9, bold=True, color="FFFFFF"\)
        if ci == 2 and val: cell.fill = p0_fill
        if ci == 3 and val: cell.fill = p1_fill
        if ci == 4 and val: cell.fill = p2_fill
    ws2.row_dimensions[ri].height = 24

# 合计行
last_row = len\(domain_order\) + 2
totals = ["合计", total_p[0], total_p[1], total_p[2], sum\(total_p\)]
for ci, val in enumerate\(totals, 1\):
    cell = ws2.cell\(row=last_row, column=ci, value=val\)
    cell.font = Font\(name="微软雅黑", bold=True, size=10\)
    cell.fill = PatternFill\("solid", fgColor="E0E0E0"\)
    cell.alignment = center
    cell.border = border
ws2.row_dimensions[last_row].height = 28

# ── 保存 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
out = "/Users/zhoukeyu/Desktop/基准线/product-design/功能清单_调研工具_v1.0.xlsx"
wb.save\(out\)
print\(f"✅ 已保存：{out}"\)
print\(f"   功能点总数：{seq-1}"\)
print\(f"   P0: {total_p[0]}  P1: {total_p[1]}  P2: {total_p[2]}"\)
EOF)
